product: Behavior change when dataset definitions are removed from Lakeflow Spark…
tagline: An upcoming release of Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines will change the behavior when a materialized view or streaming table is removed from a pipeline.
what_it_does: An upcoming release of Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines will change the behavior when a materialized view or streaming table is removed from a pipeline. With this change, the removed materialized view or streaming table will not be deleted automatically when the next pipeline update runs. Instead, you will be able to use the DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW command to delete a materialized view or the DROP TABLE command to delete a streaming table.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: An upcoming release of Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines will change the behavior when a materialized view or streaming table is removed from a pipeline. With this change, the removed materialized view or streaming table will not be deleted automatically…
key_takeaway: An upcoming release of Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines will change the behavior when a materialized view or streaming table is removed from a pipeline.
